comment_text.snp2.1:1.4: The gods are invoked in the Vedic fashion. Compare eg. Rig Veda 6.52.13a: “May all gods hear my call, whether in the sky or in heaven.”
comment_text.snp2.1:3.5: The asseveration of truth—the belief that “by this truth” (tena saccena, also at MN 86:15.2) effective results could be won—can be traced to Rig Veda 1.21.6 (tena satyena).
comment_text.snp2.1:11.1: Hell (niraya), the animal realm, the ghost realm (petivisaya), and the abode of the demons (asuraloka).
comment_text.snp2.1:11.2: This is often identified with the six heinous crimes beginning with murdering one’s mother (AN 6.94). However, there are three other lists of six things that do not mention these heinous crimes (AN 6.92, AN 6.93, AN 6.95). They include such errors as taking what is impermanent to be permanent.

root_text.snp2.1:2.3: Divā ca ratto ca haranti ye baliṁ,
root_text.snp2.1:3.1: Yaṁ kiñci vittaṁ idha vā huraṁ vā,

translation_text.snp2.1:1.2: on the ground or in the sky:
translation_text.snp2.1:1.3: may beings all be of happy heart,
translation_text.snp2.1:1.4: and listen carefully to what is said.
translation_text.snp2.1:2.1: So pay heed, all you beings,
translation_text.snp2.1:2.3: who day and night bring offerings;
translation_text.snp2.1:3.1: There’s no wealth in this life or the next,
translation_text.snp2.1:3.2: no sublime gem in the heavens,
translation_text.snp2.1:3.4: This sublime gem is in the Buddha:
translation_text.snp2.1:3.5: by this truth, may you be well!
translation_text.snp2.1:4.1: Ending, dispassion, the undying, the sublime,
translation_text.snp2.1:4.2: attained by the Sakyan Sage immersed in samādhi;
translation_text.snp2.1:4.3: there is nothing equal to that Dhamma.
translation_text.snp2.1:4.4: This sublime gem is in the Dhamma:
translation_text.snp2.1:4.5: by this truth, may you be well!
translation_text.snp2.1:5.1: The purity praised by the highest Buddha
translation_text.snp2.1:5.2: is said to be the “immersion with immediate fruit”;
translation_text.snp2.1:5.3: no equal to that immersion is found.
translation_text.snp2.1:5.4: This sublime gem is in the Dhamma:
translation_text.snp2.1:5.5: by this truth, may you be well!
translation_text.snp2.1:6.1: The eight individual persons praised by the good
translation_text.snp2.1:6.2: are the four pairs of the Holy One’s disciples;
translation_text.snp2.1:6.3: they are worthy of religious donations,
translation_text.snp2.1:6.4: what’s given to them is very fruitful.
translation_text.snp2.1:6.5: This sublime gem is in the Saṅgha:
translation_text.snp2.1:6.6: by this truth, may you be well!
translation_text.snp2.1:7.3: they’ve attained the goal, <j>plunged into freedom from death,
translation_text.snp2.1:7.4: and enjoy the quenching they’ve freely gained.
translation_text.snp2.1:7.5: This sublime gem is in the Saṅgha:
translation_text.snp2.1:7.6: by this truth, may you be well!
translation_text.snp2.1:8.1: As Indra’s pillar rooted in earth
translation_text.snp2.1:8.2: is not shaken by the four winds,
translation_text.snp2.1:8.3: I say a true person is like this,
translation_text.snp2.1:8.4: who sees the noble truths in experience.
translation_text.snp2.1:8.5: This sublime gem is in the Saṅgha:
translation_text.snp2.1:8.6: by this truth, may you be well!
translation_text.snp2.1:9.1: Those who fathom the noble truths
translation_text.snp2.1:9.2: taught by the one of deep wisdom,
translation_text.snp2.1:9.3: do not take an eighth life,
translation_text.snp2.1:9.4: even if they are hugely negligent.
translation_text.snp2.1:9.5: This sublime gem is in the Saṅgha:
translation_text.snp2.1:9.6: by this truth, may you be well!
translation_text.snp2.1:11.1: They’re freed from the four places of loss,
translation_text.snp2.1:11.3: This sublime gem is in the Saṅgha:
translation_text.snp2.1:11.4: by this truth, may you be well!
translation_text.snp2.1:12.1: Even if they do a bad deed
translation_text.snp2.1:12.3: they are unable to conceal it;
translation_text.snp2.1:12.4: this inability applies to <j>one who has seen the truth, they say.
translation_text.snp2.1:12.5: This sublime gem is in the Saṅgha:
translation_text.snp2.1:12.6: by this truth, may you be well!
translation_text.snp2.1:13.1: Like a tall forest tree crowned with flowers
translation_text.snp2.1:13.2: in the first month of summer;
translation_text.snp2.1:13.3: that’s how he taught the superb Dhamma,
translation_text.snp2.1:13.4: leading to extinguishment, the ultimate benefit.
translation_text.snp2.1:13.5: This sublime gem is in the Buddha:
translation_text.snp2.1:13.6: by this truth, may you be well!
translation_text.snp2.1:14.1: The superb, knower of the superb, <j>giver of the superb, bringer of the superb;
translation_text.snp2.1:14.3: This sublime gem is in the Buddha:
translation_text.snp2.1:14.4: by this truth, may you be well!
translation_text.snp2.1:15.1: The old is ended, nothing new is produced.
translation_text.snp2.1:15.2: their minds have no desire for future rebirth.
translation_text.snp2.1:15.3: Withered are the seeds, there’s no desire for growth,
translation_text.snp2.1:15.4: those attentive ones are extinguished like this lamp.
translation_text.snp2.1:15.5: This sublime gem is in the Saṅgha:
translation_text.snp2.1:15.6: by this truth, may you be well!
translation_text.snp2.1:16.2: on the ground or in the sky:
translation_text.snp2.1:16.3: the Realized One is honored by gods and humans!
translation_text.snp2.1:16.4: We bow to the Buddha! May you be safe!
translation_text.snp2.1:17.2: on the ground or in the sky:
translation_text.snp2.1:17.3: the Realized One is honored by gods and humans!
translation_text.snp2.1:17.4: We bow to the Dhamma! May you be safe!
translation_text.snp2.1:18.2: on the ground or in the sky:
translation_text.snp2.1:18.3: the Realized One is honored by gods and humans!
translation_text.snp2.1:18.4: We bow to the Saṅgha! May you be safe!

variant_text.snp2.1:8.1: pathavissito → paṭhaviṁ sito (bj, sya-all, km, pts-vp-pli1); paṭhavissito (si)
variant_text.snp2.1:11.2: Chaccābhiṭhānāni → cha cābhiṭhānāni (bj, sya-all, pts-vp-pli1) | abhabba kātuṁ → abhabbo kātuṁ (bj, sya-all)

reference_text.snp2.1:5.1: cck25.300, dr25.414, ms18Sn_264, pts-vp-pli40, vnp226, vns228
reference_text.snp2.1:15.1: mc0.380, ms18Sn_274, pts-vp-pli42, sya25.371, vnp235, vns238, vri48.120
